objective: Deliver safe Asana CLI parity through seven issue-first stacked slices and a human-gated parent PR
scope: Asana CLI metadata, help/docs, stream execution, REST operation ledger, direct reads, bounded attachment downloads, and reverse ETL policy
GSD planning, TDD, verification, worker handoffs, and automated review evidence
non_goals: generic HTTP, shell, SQL, or arbitrary API tools
additional internet research during milestone intake; the linked issue, committed top-100 research, existing Asana API ledger, and parent plan are authoritative
acceptance_criteria: all seven sub-issues are integrated through green reviewed stacked PRs
Asana connector validation and full parent verification pass at the recorded head
CLI help, manual, website, generated artifacts, fixture tests, safety policy, and review evidence are complete

sub_issues.title: Asana: CLI surface metadata (CLI parity)
sub_issues.outcome: Validated cli_surface metadata covers the 12 existing streams and typed write references without raw API access.

sub_issues.title: Asana: help and docs renderer (CLI parity)
sub_issues.outcome: Credential-free namespace, topic, leaf, JSON, manual, generated artifact, and website help parity.

sub_issues.title: Asana: stream runner (CLI parity)
sub_issues.outcome: Representative list commands use the bounded generic stream path with pagination and no duplicate transport.

sub_issues.title: Asana: operation ledger (CLI parity)
sub_issues.outcome: All 250 baseline REST endpoints retain source evidence and exactly one safe primary classification or explicit exclusion.

sub_issues.title: Asana: direct reads (CLI parity)
sub_issues.outcome: Only fixed allow-listed reads execute, with bounded JSON output and declared redaction.

sub_issues.title: Asana: bounded attachment downloads (CLI parity)
sub_issues.outcome: Fixed attachment operations enforce byte limits, safe-root confinement, traversal and symlink defenses, cancellation, and overwrite policy.

sub_issues.title: Asana: reverse ETL safety policy (CLI parity)
sub_issues.outcome: Product-safe writes map to typed actions behind plan-preview-approval-execute while sensitive, admin, and destructive operations remain governed.

tdd.red: record a failing observable behavior test per implementation slice before production edits
tdd.green: run the focused test and connector validation successfully at the implementation head
tdd.refactor: simplify declarative metadata or Go code while retaining focused and broader green gates

safety: never request print summarize or store secret values
fixture and httptest validation only; no live credentialed Asana calls
do not fetch or recrawl the Asana documentation corpus during milestone intake; preserve external URLs as citations and start from committed evidence
writes remain typed and follow plan preview approval execute
no generic HTTP shell SQL or arbitrary API escape hatch
human_gates: new dependencies or auth scope changes
secret access credentialed checks destructive external actions or reverse ETL execution
quality gate reductions or parent PR merge to main
review_route: stacked sub-PR review with parent-PR fallback and final human approval
sources: GitHub issue #380 and linked sub-issues #381 through #387, fully summarized in this context
